mapper.select: SELECT ID, QUOTA_NO AS quotaNo, PROJECT_NAME AS projectName, PROJECT_CONTENT AS projectContent, UNIT AS unit, AMOUNT AS amount, CREATE_BY AS createBy, CREATE_TIME AS createTime, UPDATE_BY AS updateBy, UPDATE_TIME AS updateTime FROM E_IC_MAINT_PROJECT_QUOTA WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_IC_MAINT_PROJECT_QUOTA ( ID, QUOTA_NO, PROJECT_NAME, PROJECT_CONTENT, UNIT, AMOUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{quotaNo}, #{projectName}, #{projectContent}, #{unit}, #{amount}, #{loginUserId}, #{now} )
mapper.update: UPDATE E_IC_MAINT_PROJECT_QUOTA SET PROJECT_NAME = #{projectName}, PROJECT_CONTENT = #{projectContent}, UNIT = #{unit}, AMOUNT = #{amount}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(QUOTA_NO) FROM E_IC_MAINT_PROJECT_QUOTA WHERE QUOTA_NO LIKE (#{prefix} || '%')
